seoTitle: Hanleys Creek vs Hanwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hanleys Creek and Hanwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hanleys Creek vs Hanwood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hanleys Creek and Hanwood.
heading: Hanleys Creek vs Hanwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hanleys Creek, New South Wales and Hanwood, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hanleys Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Hanwood (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hanleys Creek or Hanwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hanleys Creek has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Hanwood scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hanleys Creek scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Hanwood scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hanleys Creek or Hanwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hanleys Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
